title: chrysosplenium ramosum
intro: Chrysosplenium ramosum, also known as Spotted Wintergreen or Two-rowed Golden Saxifrage, is a perennial plant species in the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae). Native to East Asia, it has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various digestive issues, as well as its potential to prevent certain diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Chrysosplenium ramosum is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and is also used in some herbal supplements and traditional Chinese medicine.
